overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character traversing a snowy mountain wilderness at night. The character walks and runs through deep snow among pine trees, briefly encountering a rabbit before navigating through a narrow snowy ravine and emerging back into open terrain under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered pine trees

events.description: rabbit appears and hops across the snow in front of the character
character transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow in an open field, observing a rabbit ahead

notable_agents.action: rabbit hopping through the snow away from the character

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered ground with deep powder
dense cluster of snow-laden pine trees
dense cluster of snow-laden pine trees
snow-covered mountain ridge against dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast open snow field at night, with scattered pine trees visible in the distance. A rabbit appears and hops across the snow ahead, prompting the character to transition from walking to running as they pursue it toward the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge with increasing tree density

events.description: moving from open field into denser forested area with snow banks

agents.ego_description: running through snow toward denser tree cover and snow banks

entered.detail: large snow drift accumulating on the right side
tall pine tree with heavy snow on branches

segments.scene_description: Running through the snow, the character approaches a denser forested area where snow banks begin to form along the path. The trees close in from both sides, reducing sky visibility as the character moves deeper into the wooded terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snow passage between steep snow banks and dense pines

events.description: entering narrow ravine between steep snow-covered banks

agents.ego_description: running through a narrow snowy ravine between dense trees and snow banks

entered.detail: steep snow bank rising sharply beside the path
steep snow bank rising sharply beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow passage flanked by steep snow banks and dense pine trees, creating an enclosed corridor. The sky is mostly obscured by the surrounding trees as the character runs through the confined snowy ravine.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow meadow with scattered trees

events.description: exiting narrow passage back into open snow field

agents.ego_description: running across open snow field under starry sky

entered.detail: expansive open area with gentle snow drifts
isolated pine tree in the snow
isolated pine tree in the snow

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow ravine, the character returns to an open snow meadow under the visible night sky. The terrain opens up again with scattered pine trees as the character continues running across the vast white landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy wilderness that transitions from a vast open field into a confined forest corridor before returning to an expansive meadow. It begins with the character walking across a wide, moonlit snow field, shifting into a run as they pursue a rabbit toward a distant line of pine trees. As the character moves forward, the open landscape gives way to a denser forested area where snow banks rise and the trees close in from both sides, gradually obscuring the night sky. The scene then tightens into a narrow, enclosed ravine flanked by steep snow walls and thick pines, creating a claustrophobic corridor of white and green. Finally, the camera emerges from the confined passage as the terrain opens back up into a wide snow meadow under a clear, starry sky.
